description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named GitHub Release that triggers on pull requests, pushes to branches starting with trunk-, and tag pushes matching v*. The workflow has two jobs: release, which builds a release tarball on ubuntu-latest, and publish, which publishes the release to GitHub. The release job checks out the code, installs tools, determines the last tag, writes a version change log, copies the source, removes .git, tars the source, and uploads the release files. The publish job downloads the artifacts, creates a release on GitHub with the uploaded files and change log, but only if the workflow was triggered by a tag push.
